hotelImages.caption: Baiturrahman Grand Mosque - 2.99 km from property

address.address1: Jl. Panglima Nyak Makam, Mon Kuta no 106 Lambhuk

favoriteFeatures.name: Airport transfer
favoriteFeatures.tooltip: Airport transfer available! Additional charges may apply. To request, check the box on the booking form just before the payment page.

atfPropertyHighlights.name: Airport transfer
atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: Airport transfer available! Additional charges may apply. To request, check the box on the booking form just before the payment page.

usefulInfo.name: Breakfast charge (unless included in room price)

description.short: The car parking and the Wi-Fi are always free, so you can stay in touch and come and go as you please. Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. Don't leave before paying a visit to the famous Sultan Iskandar Muda International Airport.  Massage and restaurant are among the special facilities that will enhance your stay with on-site convenience.

details.title: Infant 0-2 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

adult: Guests 18 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

featureGroups.name: Things to do, ways to relax

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Kamarnya bersih. Tapi di bookingan di tulimg free breakfast 2 pax. Kenyataannya gak dapat breakfast samasekali. Kalau breakfast tidak di sediakan jangan di tulis include breakfast. Jd tamu merasa di scam

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Please don’t go here. The toilet is leaking. No lift/elevator. No electric kettle. You can find other hotel options that have all of these basic appliances with cheaper price. Also i booked & paid for  the deluxe 2 room with balcony, but received cheaper room. They gave my room to the walk ins. Please checked the booking upfront before giving room to customers. Very unsatisfied & disappointed with this hotel

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: It's really crazy—when there's trouble with the hotel facilities... being told to resolve it yourself, the customers just laugh!!
comments.originalComment: Ga banget--- ketika trouble pada fasilitas hotel.. disuruh selesaikan sendiri pada pelanggan ngakak!!

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: good

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Dirty. For the asking price they at least should made the room cleaner

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: We thougt this hotel is just ordinary budget hotel, but .. we are wrong. The room is big enough for 3 adult and I love the bed and towel smells.. so refreshing and clean. The surrounding area also have many shops and restaurant. Even the hotel also have good hipster cafe.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Clean, great location, free wifi and free nasi goreng+tea for breakfast. The bad thing is only no elevator so you must using stairs to go the hotel at level 2 because their using the level 1 for coffee shop.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: It is a very nice and comfortable room except for the toilet. Toilet is clean but got smell once we open the toilet door. Please check on the smell . Other than that, it is a very recommended hotel to stay.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: good place

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The street is filled with amazing restaurants and places to get food. Easy access and can always get anywhere within 10 -15 mins.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Toilet smelly

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Everything ok.. just breakfast only prob.. every day menu same.. pagi-pagi makan nasi goreng ayam, kurang sesuai 😆 yang lain semua okay..

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Good location with many cafes nearby.  Friendly staff. Clean room

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Cozy and value for the money. Don't need to go out for meal, it's a cafe style hotel. Can't expect too much for their service.
comments.reviewTitle: Value for the money, Dine in Cafe

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Overall we were satisfied with the service and enjoyed the stay. Nice food with affordable price and beautiful views. Probably need to upgrade the snorkelling equipment because the current equipment seems not working or too old for rent.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Got the room right next to the reception, staff was very loud so I had to complain even twice, which to me is a no-go, apart from that room was nice, clean, great coffee/resto just downstairs

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The hotel was good. Unfortunately the room was booked for 3 pax, but they only provide only 2 bed. And when we arrived, we add another one room. Thankfully they agreed to return another RP100,000 to us as they couldn't provide the 3 beds at earlier. The room already include breakfast, but there's no choice of food. They only provide nasi goreng. And again I was disappointed as we went down for breakfast a bit late (still between the breakfast hour) the fried rice left was plain without chicken only with fried egg. Been told as that's the only fried rice left. The manager should be responsible to make sure the receptionist atleast can understand simple English as its quite hard to explain things except in Indonesian language.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responseText:
Thank you for your positive comment about our hotel and our coffee.
It is a pleasure to have you at our hotel, we hope to welcome you again if you travel to our town in the future.

Iskandar Mirza
Manager
comments.reviewComments: Initially, I wanted to book another hotel (Hermes Palace) because of my business meeting is there . Due to not available of that hotel, I book this Hadrah hotel which is very close to meeting location (50 m only). Staffs are very friendly, but they have limited English knowledge.  Clean room. Have a coffee shop at bottom of the hotel. I enjoyed 6-7 cups of coffee during my stay :)c...Recommended: 5-star flavour in 3-star hotels

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Our room was on 3rd floor and it was dirty! We found an empty water bottle on the side of the bed. The bathroom was dirtier and kinda old. They definitely didn't clean the room very well! At least the bed was clean and okay but who knows what was on it. Not gonna stay here again.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: there's a fancy cafe on  downstair. location is good nearby many cafes, easy to find food. breakfast is limited option (only nasi goreng with egg or chicken). the toilet a bit smelly

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: i came in late night, the staff didn't kind, i asked for hot water for my kiddos, and he didn't they haven't, what the??? so sorry but i paid you for my stayed, fix it up management

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The room was nice. The breakfast was great. However, the water was smelly.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Good enough.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
On a rather late arrival, past 9pm, my first impression of the hotel is that its not a hotel but a popular cafe. We had to go through the cafe full of people up the backstairs to the first floor. The reception is fortunately very friendly and we were given a front room on the same floor. Room is clean, quite spacious, good kingsize bed. Bathroom is smallish but adequate with good hot water.

When we went out for dinner, the location of the hotel is in a 'happening' part of town...lots of cafes and shops around. 

Really glad I chose to stay in this hotel

comments.reviewComments:
La cama es comoda. Nuestra habitación muy ruidosa xq la carretera está al lado y tiene la teraza de la cafeteria debajo.
El baño no tiene lavabo.
El personal no habla apenas ingles.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?

Dear Ms. Brigitte

Thank you for reviewing our hotel, it is our pleasure to serve you and we hope to see you again in our hotel
in near future. Merci Beaucoup.

Mirza
comments.reviewComments:
hotel bien placé
personnel tout à fait à sa place

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: たぶん町の中心部から離れていると思うが、エルメスホテルのすぐ近くに立地。周囲は、様様なカフェが並ぶが、おそらくここの1階のカフェが一番おしゃれ。レセプションは、カフェを通り過ぎた2階にあり。ブティックホテルをイメージしたと思われるが、部屋は狭い。そして、洗面台がない。よって、手洗いなどは、蛇口から直接排水溝へ。これに耐えられるかどうかである。ただ、お酒なしでもよく眠れたのはよかった。朝食は、25,000ルピア相当のナシゴレンとお茶。割高感もあって、お勧めできるかどうか何とも言えない。まあ、おそらくこの街に来ることはないと思うが…

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Kamar mandinya parah, masa air panasnya ga jalan, udah gitu airnya keluar kecil mandi aja susah

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Saat saya memilih hotel dimaksud dengan harapan dapat merasakan bermalam di hotel yg dekat dengan banyak hal, tetapi kenyataannya setelah tiba ditempat waktu mau cek in ternyata kamar telah penuh dan kami dipindahkan ke hotel lain tidak sesuai harapan.

Padahal sebelumnya tidak ada pemberitahuan apa2 dari pihak hotel dan sebelum waktu cek in ada kita telpon utk memastikan kamarnya tersedia.

Pada initnya kami sangat kecewa, semoga hal yg kami alami jadi perhatian pihak management agar lebih memperhatikan kepuasan pelanggan.

Demikian

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: bersih dan nyaman, perlu perhatikan untuk fasilitas kamar yg rusak untuk segera diperbaiki atau di ganti

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Air bau zat besi. Lebih cocok disebut Losmen

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Mandi pakai air tanah yang bau zat besi,. Tidak ada layanan room cleaning.  Tidak ada pilihan menu sarapan. Lebih cocok disebut Losmen.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responseText:
Salam Bapak Mahmud,

Maaf atas ketidaknyamanan bapak selama menginap di hotel kami karena masalah air yang keruh,
karena adanya masalah teknis di penyaring air bersih kami. Tetapi masalah tersebut sudah kami atasi dan kami berjanji hal tersebut tidak akan terjadi lagi di kemudian hari.
comments.reviewComments: lokasi strategis bnyak tempat makan disekitar, kamar nya nyaman namun air nya yang menurut saya sangat tidak layak untuk bahkan untuk mandi sekalipun sangat keruh dan kekuning2an , karena masih menggunakan air sumur
